parameters.name: contractStarts

parameters.name: deliveryDays
parameters.description: (Deprecated: DeliveryDays is no longer used. Use DeliveryStartTime and DeliveryEndTime instead.)

parameters.name: deliveryStartTime
parameters.description: Returns strategies where the delivery starts at the specified time or any time afterward.

parameters.name: deliveryEndTime
parameters.description: Defines the latest allowable delivery end time, limiting the visible time frame.

tradeId.description: Null in allocations generated by a basket of trades.

parameters.description:
Strategy parameters to be applied to the strategy

</br>
If provided together with Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Strategy.StrategyPositionModelBase.ParameterTemplateId, parameter template is applied first, then the individual parameter values are modified.

parameterTemplateId.description:
ID of the parameter template to be applied to the strategy

</br>
If not provided, a default matching parameter template will be applied

price.description: Either Price or OpenQuantity must be provided

openQuantity.description: Either Price or OpenQuantity must be provided

parameters.description:
Strategy parameters to  be applied to the strategy

</br>
If provided together with Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Strategy.ModifyStrategyModel.ParameterTemplateId, the parameter template is applied first, then the individual parameter values are modified

parameterTemplateId.description: ID of the parameter template to be applied to the strategy

PostPositionUpdateAction.description: Describes action to be taken after adaptively updating a position.

parameters.description:
Strategy parameters to be applied to the strategy

</br>
If provided together with Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Strategy.StrategyPositionModelBase.ParameterTemplateId, parameter template is applied first, then the individual parameter values are modified.

parameterTemplateId.description:
ID of the parameter template to be applied to the strategy

</br>
If not provided, a default matching parameter template will be applied

assignByText.description: Indicates if text should be used for grouping and matching orders/strategies before updating the position

defaultBuyLimit.description: Default buy limit (used as fallback for Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Common.LimitUpdateBehaviour.NewOrDefault or Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Common.LimitUpdateBehaviour.Combined)

defaultSellLimit.description: Default sell limit (used as fallback for Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Common.LimitUpdateBehaviour.NewOrDefault or Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Common.LimitUpdateBehaviour.Combined)

assignByText.description: Indicates if text should be used for grouping and matching orders/strategies before updating the position

defaultBuyLimit.description: Default buy limit (used as fallback for Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Common.LimitUpdateBehaviour.NewOrDefault or Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Common.LimitUpdateBehaviour.Combined)

defaultSellLimit.description: Default sell limit (used as fallback for Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Common.LimitUpdateBehaviour.NewOrDefault or Volue.AlgoTrader.Power.Api.Models.Common.LimitUpdateBehaviour.Combined)
